name: edge-case
task: Create a comparison table widget that shows side-by-side metrics for 2-5 companies. The number of companies is dynamic — it could be 2 or it could be 5. Handle the variable column count gracefully.
assertions: The component dynamically renders columns based on the data array length — does not hardcode a fixed number of company columns
The component includes handling for the minimum case (2 companies) and does not break visually or logically with that count
Borders use 1px width only — no border wider than 1px appears in the component styles
The component accepts WidgetPayload as its props type (not a custom one-off interface that diverges from the contract)
Hover states are defined for interactive elements (rows, cells, or the card itself) with a transition duration specified
